abstract.para: Commissioning, tuning, and field-diagnostic workflows for CiA 402 motor drives via the Qt 6 desktop diagnostic built on vr-mc-sdk.

chapter.title: Overview
chapter.para: The diagnostic is a standalone Qt 6 application that talks to CiA 402 motor drives over a hal_can transport. It wraps the master_mgr and motor_drive_interface C layers from vr-mc-sdk in a signal/slot-based Qt worker thread and surfaces the state, telemetry, and commissioning knobs of every attached slave.

row.entry: Loopback against motor_drive_cia402 simulator or host bring-up.
USB-CANFD adapter talking to real drives.

chapter.para: Drives appear in the slave table as soon as a connection is established; telemetry is driven by TPDO1 at whatever rate the drive emits (2 kHz in the bundled simulator).

chapter.title: Connecting

listitem.para: File Connect… (CtrlK), or the plug icon on the toolbar.
Pick the transport. UDP defaults to 239.192.0.42:23400; ZLG asks for channel, arbitration bitrate, and data-phase bitrate.
Set First node id and Count. The diagnostic brings up that range and registers each slave into master_mgr.
Click Connect. The status bar flips green and the table fills.

chapter.para: Reconnect (CtrlR) replays the last config; Disconnect tears everything down idempotently.

figure.title: Main window connected to the simulator

row.entry: File, Connect/Disconnect, detachable panes, Drive, E-STOP.
One row per slave: id, state, online, position, velocity, torque.
QtCharts multi-channel scope for the active slave.
Info + error stream from the worker.

sect1.title: Control tab
sect1.para: Bringup, Enable, Disable, Fault reset buttons plus mode selector (none · torque · velocity · position) and a setpoint spin box. Targets route through master_mgr_set_target_one.

sect1.title: Gains tab
sect1.para: Per-loop (current, velocity, position) Kp + Ki spin boxes with Read / Write buttons. Reads round-trip via SDO and land on the gainRead signal.

sect1.title: Signal generator tab
sect1.para: Constant / step / ramp / sine / chirp waveforms. Configurable amplitude, offset, frequency (plus frequency end for chirp), duration, and update rate. Drives the selected target on the slave at the chosen rate.

sect1.title: Profile
sect1.para: Shows the loaded MotorParams: pole pair, Rs, Lsd, Lsq, rated flux, inertia, limits. Edit… opens a modal; File Save Profile persists to JSON.

listitem.para: Step response — pulses the signal generator and overlays cmd vs. actual, reporting overshoot, rise time, and steady-state error.
Bode — log-sweep chirp + Goertzel correlation produces magnitude (dB) and phase (°) vs. frequency.

sect1.title: PDO map
sect1.para: Two sections (TPDO1 / RPDO1) with a live table: offset, OD index, sub, bits, name, decoded value. The Value column ticks at the worker rate. Edit… opens a mapping editor; on accept the diagnostic runs the CiA 301 §7.2.2.2 remap dance via SDO (disable PDO, clear count, write entries, restore count, re-enable).

chapter.title: Configure Drive
chapter.para: Opens via Drive Configure Drive… (CtrlShiftC). Modeless tabbed dialog that opens with the selected slave and kicks off an SDO read so the form reflects the drive, not defaults.

figure.title: Commissioning workflow — cold connect to tuned

sect1.title: Homing
sect1.para: Method (0x6098), home offset (0x607C), switch / zero search speeds (0x6099:1,2), homing acceleration (0x609A).

listitem.para: Start Homing — writes mode = 6 to 0x6060, pulses controlword bit 4 on 0x6040 (0x000F → 0x001F). Status banner decodes statusword bits 10 / 12 / 13 live (target reached · homing attained · homing error).
Zero encoder here — reads position_actual (0x6064) and writes it to home_offset (0x607C). Makes "here" the new origin without typing counts.

sect1.title: Motion profile
sect1.para: Profile velocity (0x6081), profile accel/decel (0x6083/0x6084), quickstop decel (0x6085).

sect1.title: Protection
sect1.para: Max following error (0x6065) and time (0x6066); position limits (0x607D:1,2); max motor speed (0x6080); max torque (0x6072). Zero torque here reads torque_actual (0x6077) and writes it into torque_offset (0x60B2).

listitem.para: Read from drive — batch SDO upload. Missing OD entries are reported but don't abort the batch.
Apply — batch SDO download. Partial failures surface in the log and a warning dialog.
OK — Apply then close. Cancel — discard.
Save / Load Config to Flash — planned: SDO write to 0x1010:1 / 0x1011:1 with ASCII save / load.
Upload Firmware… — target + file picker, simulated 5-second upload with progress bar (real loader deferred).
Record telemetry (CtrlShiftR) — placeholder for per-snapshot CSV.
Export telemetry CSV… — saves buffered chart data.

chapter.title: E-STOP
chapter.para: Large red button, always visible. Shortcut Space is application-wide and fires even when a control has focus. On click: stops any running signal generator, then calls master_mgr_disable_all which drives every slave into Switch-On Disabled.

row.entry: Drive doesn't expose these CiA 402 objects (the simulator doesn't).
Drive not responding — check node id, bus up, transport.
No TPDO received; drive not emitting or COB-ID mismatch.

sect1.title: UDP multicast
sect1.para: Two sockets per connection (one SDO, one PDO), both bound to 239.192.0.42:23400 on the loopback interface with SO_REUSEADDR. A 12-byte header (sender tag · COB-ID · len · flags) rides each packet so the sockets filter self-echoes.

sect1.title: ZLG USB-CANFD
sect1.para: libcontrolcanfd.so is opened with dlopen() at runtime; the shared object ships in src/backends/zlg/lib/. One endpoint per channel — PDO is not yet wired on this transport (V1 is SDO-only).
